title: Young Wins THE PLAYERS
excerpt: Cameron Young claims THE PLAYERS Championship title, winning $4.5m
body:
THE PLAYERS Championship Recap

Cameron Young has won the 2026 THE PLAYERS Championship, finishing with a score of -13 and earning a staggering $4,500,000. Young's impressive performance saw him take the top spot on the leaderboard, with England's Matt Fitzpatrick coming in second at -12.

Leaderboard Breakdown

The top of the leaderboard was tightly contested, with Xander Schauffele and Robert MacIntyre finishing in third and fourth place respectively. The tournament saw a number of notable performances, including a strong showing from Ludvig Åberg, who finished tied for fifth place.

Tournament Stats

Winner's Score
-13
Winner's Earnings
$4,500,000
Second Place
Matt Fitzpatrick
FedEx Points Awarded to Winner
750

DP World Tour and LIV Golf Updates

In other golf news, the DP World Tour is set to continue with the Hero Indian Open, taking place from March 26-29. Meanwhile, LIV Golf has announced its latest schedule, with the Singapore 2026 event having taken place from March 12-15 at Sentosa Golf Club.
